sections.description: Full-bleed hero with persistent top nav bar, brand wordmark centered, primary CTA pill at top-right, overlaid headline and single dominant CTA button bottom-left
Tabbed category selector above a two-up product card row, each card with image, title, descriptive text, and inline text CTA link
Two-column band with large left-aligned headline and sub-section text blocks paired with a supporting image on the right
Large centered serif statement headline anchoring the top of the page
Section label followed by a three-column product card grid; cards show image with badge, title, ingredient text, and nutrition metric row
Additional categorized three-column product card grid continuing with badges, titles, descriptions and metric rows
Full-bleed image hero with left headline, center supporting paragraph, and right outlined secondary CTA pill
Section title row with a state filter dropdown selector aligned right for jump-to navigation
Region-grouped grid of location cards, each with name, address, hours, and dual View/Order action buttons
Modal support chat overlay with branded header, message thread area, automated greeting bubble, consent disclosure text, and message input field, layered over the underlying hero page
Background full-bleed hero with overlaid headline and dominant CTA button bottom-left, partially dimmed beneath the chat modal
